go_no_go_for_iteration_17b.guidance: 17-B may test circular metrics and seam-crossing routes; it must not inherit circular claims from unwrap robustness alone.

robustness_summary.interpretation: The Iteration 17 ring M6 candidate is robust across all declared unwrap origins whose seam does not intersect the active route. Seam-intersecting unwraps are recorded as controls and do not promote circular or wrap-crossing claims.

unwrap_robustness_policy.accepted_origin_rule: unwrap seam must not intersect the active forward/reversed route edges
unwrap_robustness_policy.seam_control_rule: seam-intersecting origins are controls and cannot promote robustness
